name: Ortho Cot
title: Non Absorbent Cotton
description: Orthopedic padding that provides soft, comfortable cushioning and protection for the patient.
features: Used for padding under Plaster of Paris Bandage (POP)

usage: Padding and protection under Plaster of Paris bandages
